description: Video demux dependency for kapi — bundles ffmpeg/ffprobe (LGPL) per platform so the in-process video reader can demux a video into an audio track (→ kapi-asr) and sampled frames (→ kapi-vision OCR) without a system ffmpeg install.
author: Neokapi <hello@neokapi.dev>

commands.name: av
commands.long: Print the kapi-av version and the bundled ffmpeg/ffprobe paths. The host's in-process video demux (core/av) discovers this plugin's directory and uses the bundled binaries; this plugin runs no daemon.

av.bundled_license: ffmpeg: LGPL-2.1+ build, separate executables (see NOTICE)
